_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: The discriminant functions classified participants with NF1, TD, and NS with 98%, 85%, and 84% accuracy respectively.
details: Linear discriminant analysis classified participants with 98% accuracy for NF1, 85% for TD, and 84% for NS. After cross-validation, NF1 classification remained high at 97.2% with precision 96%, sensitivity 96%, and specificity 98.4%
